# llama-ai

> Local LLM inference on AMD APU hardware using llama.cpp. Self-contained - no system ROCm install required. Vulkan (RADV) is the default backend for best stability on RDNA3 iGPUs.

## Why

Agentic AI development on an Ayaneo Flip KB (7840U / 32GB) handheld - usable offline. No API keys, no per-token costs. Cached state survives reboots and power outages. CLIO is optimized for this implementation to maximize cache reuse across agentic turns.

## Quick start

```bash
git clone --recurse-submodules https://github.com/fewtarius/llama-ai.git
cd llama-ai
./scripts/rebuild.sh
./llama-run.sh --server  # http://localhost:9090
```

## Key features

- SSD-backed KV cache with hot/warm/cold tiering (persists across server restarts)
- Hybrid MoE model fixes (Qwen3.5/3.6) - 13 patches for checkpoint restore correctness
- Auto GPU detection for AMD APUs (Cezanne through Strix Halo)
- GTT memory configuration via kernel parameters
- CLIO integration with deterministic JSON serialization for cache reuse
- Benchmarking with full TTFT (Time To First Token) measurement

## Benchmark results (Ayaneo Flip KB, Vulkan)

| Model | Large TTFT (cold) | Large TTFT (warm) | Speedup | Gen TPS |
|-------|-------------------|-------------------|---------|---------|
| GLM-4.7-Flash | 452.9s (7.5min) | 2.9s | 154.6x | 6.5 |
| Gemma 4 26B | 138.9s (2.3min) | 1.3s | 104.8x | 15.7 |
| Qwen3.5-27B | 391.5s (6.5min) | 2.9s | 134.2x | 4.1 |
| Qwen3.6-35B | 125.0s (2.1min) | 1.0s | 130.3x | 21.2 |

Full data with server logs: benchmarks/20260508-2002/

## Structure

- `llama-run.sh` - Main entry point (model detection, server launch)
- `scripts/rebuild.sh` - Build (Vulkan default, optional ROCm)
- `scripts/detect-gpu.sh` - AMD GPU auto-detection
- `scripts/benchmark.sh` - SSD prompt cache performance testing
- `CachyLLama/` - Submodule (fork of ggml-org/llama.cpp with custom changes)
- `patches/` - Incremental patches on top of upstream
- `kv-cache/` - SSD-backed KV cache directory

## Documentation

- README.md - Full documentation with benchmark details and methodology
- AGENTS.md - Technical reference for AI agents working on this project
- .clio/instructions.md - CLIO project instructions
